# Surplus Value Router

Verified AntSeed provider for explicitly routed OpenAI-compatible services.

- Connection page: https://woodfuturebj-boop.github.io/
- Peer ID: c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b
- Seller wallet: 0xc50DE6922b00677c93007c01924586dE887ced7b
- Settlement: Base mainnet USDC
- Live catalog: antseed network peer c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b
- Session pin: antseed buyer connection set --peer c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b
- High-demand general route: c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b@gpt-5.4
- Public gpt-5.4 route: https://woodfuturebj-boop.github.io/?model=gpt-5.4#first-workload
- High-demand multilingual route: c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b@glm-5.2
- Public glm-5.2 route: https://woodfuturebj-boop.github.io/?model=glm-5.2#first-workload
- High-demand frontier coding route: c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b@claude-opus-4.8
- Public claude-opus-4.8 route: https://woodfuturebj-boop.github.io/?model=claude-opus-4.8#first-workload
- Low-cost first workload: c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b@minimax-m2.7
- Public minimax-m2.7 route: https://woodfuturebj-boop.github.io/?model=minimax-m2.7#first-workload
- AntFeed MCP: npx -y @antfeed/mcp
- External buyer guide: https://github.com/woodfuturebj-boop/antseed-proof/blob/main/BETA.md
- Support: https://github.com/woodfuturebj-boop/antseed-proof/issues/new?template=support.yml

Featured services: minimax-m2.7, opus-4.7, claude-opus-4.8, claude-sonnet-5, gpt-5.4, glm-5.2.

Do not use self-trading, artificial traffic, or test volume. Never submit secrets.
